articles.author: Aaron Rennie
articles.title: Stock Market Today: Futures Point Higher After Indexes Sink; Oil Slips as Investors Take US Attacks on Iran in Stride; Oracle Drops on AI Spending - Investopedia
articles.description: Major equities indexes rebounded Thursday from sharp losses in the prior session, as tech stocks mostly gained and investors shook off a warning from President Donald Trump that the U.S. "will be hitting Iran" tonight.
